scripts.build: bun x tsc -p packages/static-core/tsconfig.build.json && bun x tsc -p packages/static-json/tsconfig.build.json && bun x tsc -p packages/static-hono/tsconfig.build.json && bun x tsc -p packages/static-esbuild/tsconfig.build.json && bun x tsc -p packages/static-rollup/tsconfig.build.json && bun x tsc -p packages/static-vite/tsconfig.build.json && bun x tsc -p packages/static-cache-s3/tsconfig.build.json && bun x tsc -p packages/static-deploy-s3/tsconfig.build.json && bun x tsc -p packages/static/tsconfig.build.json
scripts.test: bun run build && bun test packages examples
